det_check_template:
proof fn det_page_to_thread(page_ptr: PagePtr, page_perm: Tracked<PagePerm4k>, pt_regs: Registers, owning_container: ContainerPtr, owning_proc: ProcPtr, proc_rev_ptr: SLLIndex, scheduler_rev_ptr: SLLIndex, r1: (ThreadPtr, Tracked<PointsTo<Thread>>), r2: (ThreadPtr, Tracked<PointsTo<Thread>>))
    requires (page_perm@.is_init()), (page_perm@.addr() == page_ptr),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (r1.0 == page_ptr)
            &&& (r1.1@.is_init())
            &&& (r1.1@.addr() == r1.0)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().owning_container == owning_container)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().owning_proc == owning_proc)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().state == ThreadState::SCHEDULED)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().proc_rev_ptr == proc_rev_ptr)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().scheduler_rev_ptr == Some(scheduler_rev_ptr))
            &&& (r1.1@.value().blocking_endpoint_ptr.is_None())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().endpoint_rev_ptr.is_None())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().running_cpu.is_None())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().endpoint_descriptors@ =~= Seq::new(
            MAX_NUM_ENDPOINT_DESCRIPTORS as nat,
            |i: int| { None },
        ))
            &&& (r1.1@.value().ipc_payload.is_None())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().error_code.is_None())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().trap_frame.unwrap() =~= pt_regs)
            &&& (r2.0 == page_ptr)
            &&& (r2.1@.is_init())
            &&& (r2.1@.addr() == r2.0)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().owning_container == owning_container)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().owning_proc == owning_proc)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().state == ThreadState::SCHEDULED)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().proc_rev_ptr == proc_rev_ptr)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().scheduler_rev_ptr == Some(scheduler_rev_ptr))
            &&& (r2.1@.value().blocking_endpoint_ptr.is_None())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().endpoint_rev_ptr.is_None())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().running_cpu.is_None())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().endpoint_descriptors@ =~= Seq::new(
            MAX_NUM_ENDPOINT_DESCRIPTORS as nat,
            |i: int| { None },
        ))
            &&& (r2.1@.value().ipc_payload.is_None())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().error_code.is_None())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().trap_frame.unwrap() =~= pt_regs)
        }) ==> det_page_to_thread_equal(r1, r2),
{
{ASSUMES}}
